content.en:
The Blood Shadow Mist Ancestor knew very well that the matter of the Ten Thousand Law Ancestor encroaching on an exotic world and provoking the Blood Mist Alliance was far less important than the real big thing of the Blood Mist Alliance.

That incident was enough to change the fate of the Blood Mist Alliance, and it was the most important thing at the moment.

Sanctuary Heaven and Earth.

Ye Tian emptied the entire Holy Realm Heaven and Earth, even those strongest who were most hidden and the holy beasts under the strongest were all found by him and wiped them out one by one.

This is what must be done to occupy a heaven and earth, only when all the creatures of a foreign world are destroyed, it is easy to steal the authority of a heaven and earth, if there are still many living beings or a few supreme powers, it is almost impossible to steal the authority, and it is impossible to transform the entire sacred world.

"Let's start the makeover!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Rumble!!!

The second-order gate specially established by Ye Tian began to expand its base under the control of the secret arts, encroaching on the territory of the entire Holy Realm Heaven and Earth.

To invade the foreign world, it must use the door, and the door is actually to use the loopholes of the rules to cross one foreign world after another, so it can also use the loopholes to change some of the rules of the foreign world, or even assimilate the rules.

Of course, the premise is that you must have the secret art of encroaching on the rules of the foreign world.

This kind of secret technique is almost top secret in the exotic world, but it is not a very precious secret technique in an eternal world like the Tianlin Realm, and there are all kinds of such secret techniques in the Tianfeng Sea, and they are very cheap, so Ye Tian bought several such secret techniques, which can be used for various special situations.

At this rate, it only takes billions of years for the Second Order Gate to completely transform the entire Sanctuary Heaven and Earth, making the rules of this Exotic Heaven and Earth similar to the Dark Forbidden Realm.

In this way, the creatures of the Dark Forbidden Realm can enter the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth to live.

Even if the second-order gate is destroyed, the rules of the Sanctuary Heaven and Earth will still remain unchanged and will not be reversed.

Time passed slowly, and the speed at which the Sacred Domain Heaven and Earth was transformed became faster and faster, even far faster than the flight speed of a peerless Domain Ancestor.

And Ye Tian has been sitting near the second-order gate that connects the Dark Forbidden Domain and the Holy Domain Heaven and Earth to prevent anyone from destroying the second-order gate, once the second-order gate is destroyed, it will be as useless as the Blood Mist Alliance was at the beginning.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian sensed that there was an invincible person approaching, and there was more than one.

In the beginning, he was only because he was invincible in the passing.

After all, if the invincible person rushes to the Tianlin Realm, he will pass through one foreign world after another, and if he passes through the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth, this is also normal.

As long as he doesn't provoke him, he won't stop these invincibles who pass by.

But soon, he realized that these invincibles were not passing.

The three invincibles descended here together, and were looking for him, and soon locked the location of the second-order gate, and also locked his position.

"Troublemakers?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He hadn't offended the invincible, and it stands to reason that no invincible would come to him for trouble.

After a little thought, he could roughly guess who these people were.

Blood Mist Alliance!

This time, several supreme beings of the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth were also here, unwilling to leave, and were killed by him.

Therefore, it is very likely that the super-famous force of the Blood Mist Alliance came to trouble him, and as soon as he was dispatched, there were three invincibles, which showed that the Blood Mist Alliance attached great importance to him.

Bang!!!

Three invincible people descended not far from Ye Tian, staring at Ye Tian.

If the invincible person does not move his hands and does not show his breath, it is difficult to know the strength of the realm.

Ye Tian's progress was too fast, so he learned a secret technique of hiding his aura early, that is, he was worried that walking in the Tianfeng Sea would cause unnecessary trouble and attention due to the rapid increase in strength, so he usually habitually hid his aura and only revealed the realm of an invincible, but it was difficult for others to know his true strength.

In the eyes of others, Ye Tian was definitely an invincible, but it was difficult to confirm whether he was in the sixth rank invincible or the fifth rank invincible.

The three invincibles of the Blood Mist Alliance naturally did not think that Ye Tian was a fifth-rank invincible, after all, not long after Ye Tiancai broke through to the invincible, he must be a sixth-rank invincible, and he was a very weak sixth-rank invincible.

"You are the Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws?"

Blood Mist Alliance Leader Blood Shadow Mist Ancestor asked coldly.

"I am the Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, are you the invincible of the Blood Mist Alliance?" Ye Tiandao.

"That's good!" Blood Shadow Mist Ancestor nodded, "You actually killed the strongest of our Blood Mist Alliance, this is a provocation to our Blood Mist Alliance, and you dare to invade the Holy Land Heaven and Earth, this Holy Land Heaven and Earth is the foreign world that we have already designated as the next to invade, you are the foreign world that has seized our Blood Mist Alliance." You are also invincible, cultivation is not easy, if you are willing to compensate our Blood Mist Alliance for one million Origin Rule Robbery Crystals, then forget about this matter!"

A million Origin Rule Heist Crystals is nothing for a slightly wealthy invincible, but it is definitely a huge amount of money for a new invincible.

Therefore, the Blood Shadow Mist Ancestor's request was absolutely excessive.

"Huh!"

Ye Tian sneered.

A mere million Origin Rule Robbery Crystals was indeed nothing to him, and he could easily take them out.

But why did he give the Blood Mist Alliance?

"I'm in a bad mood right now, if you get out of here, I won't kill you, if you still stay here, then stay forever!" Ye Tian directly threatened.

"Look for death!"

The three invincible people of the Blood Shadow Mist Ancestor were extremely angry and immediately attacked.

They wanted to kill Ye Tian, the invincible, in an instant, after all, their three major invincibles had also been cultivating for a long time, and they were definitely the top among ordinary sixth-rank invincibles, far surpassing ordinary sixth-rank invincibles.

However, they met Ye Tian.

Burst!

Ye Tian took out the knife, and the long knife of the medium-grade robbery weapon slashed through the bodies of the three invincibles.

In an instant, the bodies of the three invincibles were cut in two, and the terrifying power was eroding their bodies.

The next moment, their physical bodies were annihilating, their souls were crumbling, and they couldn't recover at all.

"No!"

The Blood Shadow Mist Ancestor said in despair.

Then, Ye Tian slashed out again, completely erasing their lives.

The three invincible people died like ants at Ye Tian's hands.

----------------------

An exotic world controlled by the Blood Mist Alliance, where the Immortal Mist Ancestor was guarding, suddenly felt a palpitation and panic.

"Could it be that something happened to the Blood Shadow Mist Ancestor, shouldn't it be?"

He didn't have a teleportation object that could communicate across the two exotic worlds, and that kind of teleportation was too precious for him to have, so he couldn't contact the Blood Shadow Mist Ancestor and them.

But.

Once the Blood Shadow Mist Ancestor falls, some of the treasures they left behind in the Blood Mist Alliance Headquarters will become ownerless.

Therefore, the Blood Mist Alliance quickly learned that the Blood Shadow Mist Ancestor had fallen, and the news immediately spread to the Immortal Mist Ancestor.

"It's not good, I've provoked a big enemy!"

The pupils of the Misty Ancestor shrank sharply.
